# Logister

Logister is a free bug capture and triage tool for Ruby on Rails applications.

## Public pages
- Home: /
- About: /about
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms of Use: /terms

## Product summary
- Captures and groups Rails errors.
- Shows stacktrace, request context, and occurrence history.
- Uses the `logister-ruby` gem for instrumentation and delivery.

## Primary audience
- Rails developers and teams looking for lightweight error tracking.

## Companion gem
- RubyGems: https://rubygems.org/gems/logister-ruby
- Source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-ruby
